reviews.review_title: cannot complete some puzzles after updat
reviews.review_description: After the last update, there are puzzles that are impossible to complete.  There are now pieces that will not attach to the others.  You can have the entire puzzle done, except for one piece, and that piece will not attach.

developer_response.body: We're very sorry — the puzzle logic in this game is quite complex, so occasional bugs may occur. If you encounter a bug that prevents you from completing the puzzle, please try restarting it. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description:
It's a really nice puzzle game. It just needs more puzzles to do.  When I bought it I was a little disappointed about the number of puzzles. I did enjoy the ones they have. I just really hope they add some soon. Just needs more☺️

EDIT: I just seen you added DLC. So excited. Purchased and it says it's downloaded and installed. But it's not there. PLEASE HELP.

developer_response.body:
"Sorry for the wait. If you’ve already downloaded the DLC but it’s not showing up, you can try clicking the refresh button on the left sidebar. If it still doesn’t appear, you may not have enabled storage access permissions—DLCs need to be downloaded locally and then read. Here’s how to enable it:

1. Go to Library → Find our Game

2.Tap the three dots( · · · ) in the top-right corner of the game icon

3.Select Settings → Open Storage

This will grant the necessary permissions. Rest assured, our game does not collect or steal any of your personal information."

reviews.review_title: Great game but would like a guide
reviews.review_description:
Tried your Discord link, but it's expired. Can't we start getting unselected pieces on the same pages as you progress? I have searched for a guide but cannot find one. 😕 

Other than that, I LOVE this game. I'm disabled so play while seated in a stationary position. I'm fumbling through best I can. 💘

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing and providing feedback on this game. We will actively optimize it and update more content.

The correct Discord
https://discord.gg/aqV9QaertN

reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this good looking and beautiful puzzle games, I enjoyed it very much, but more puzzles please.  Suggestions old buildings , house if possible. 
Please continue to add more puzzles. Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and providing feedback on this game. We will actively optimize it and update more content.

reviews.review_description:
I played the trial, completed 22% of a puzzle, and just had to buy it!
The objects are fun, though challenging due to the 3D nature of it (less direct jigsaw puzzle-like shapes to connect) compared to Puzzling Places. Think more like Shores of Loci (though seems a bit easier than that game luckily).
The visuals are nice and the music soothing as well as fitting. So the package seems excellent and is a definite must-have for puzzle fans, especially of the 2 games I mentioned already.

The ONLY thing I kind of want to count as a negative but won't given the very modezt price tag, is the extreme lack of content. Especially right now, with only 3 out of 6-7 (I cant recall the numbers atm, forgive me...😅) being available currently. The others being listed as "Coming Soon" isn't a problem, especiallygivren it's Early Access state, but that even with all listed puzzles together it's very little content (though each puzzle has around 3-4 different difficulties to complete).

That said, I'll still greatly enjoy what is here and can't wait for more! I hope the developers stick to this game, because they've really made a winner!

A pleasent surprise that I highly recommend!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable advice.
We will continue to improve and update. stay tuned. Thank you so much.

reviews.review_description: The puzzle game can actually be made into a 3D state, which is very innovative and fun. I recommend everyone to try playing it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing and providing feedback on this game. We will actively optimize it and update more content.
